ab: blaq kayal nya coni?
en: A: How is the weather today?

ab: nyan mhtux wagi nya la, kilux calay kayal nya.
en: The sun is coming out, it's very hot.

ab: baq qhiyaq tanux ku?
en: A: Is it going to be cold outside?

ab: ltu calay tanux, piyux hayi mlukus.
en: B: It's cold, so wear more clothes.

ab: baq kilux tanux ku?
en: A: Will it be hot outside?

ab: ini, nyan sbehuy la, sbehuy calay tanux.
en: B: No, it's windy and cool.

ab: maha nanu kayal nya coni?
en: A: How is the weather today?

ab: ini kilus ru ini kltu, coni, blaq calay kayal nya.
ch: B:今天不冷也不熱，很舒服。
en: B: It's neither cold nor hot today, very comfortable.

ab: maha nanu kayal gbyan coni?
en: A: How is the weather tonight?

ab: uka yulung nya, cyan mhtux qa knituh la.
ch: B:天空沒有雲，星星出來了。
en: B: There were no clouds in the sky; the stars came out.

ab: maha nanu kayal nya tanux?
en: A: How is the weather outside?

ab: mica na mhngaw qwalax nya, mhtux wagi ru hongu utux la.
ch: B:雨剛剛停，出了太陽，彩虹出來了。
en: B: The rain has just stopped, the sun has come out, the rainbow is coming out.

ab: maha nanu kayal mamu kya hiya?
en: A: How is the weather there?

ab: nyan mbehuy cami cqani hiya.
en: B: We're going to have a big storm here.

ab: blaq kayal mamu kya hiya?
en: A: How's the weather there?

ab: blaq kayal nya, tyaba wagi nya cqani.
en: B: Very well, out of the big sun.

ab: musa cu pqwasan biru la.
en: A: I have to go to school.

ab: ltu kayal nya, piyux hayi mlukus.
en: B: The weather is very cold, so wear more clothes.

ab: musa cu tanux kisa la.
en: A: I'm going out.

ab: baq tyaba qwalax nya kisa, kngyay su maray bruku.
ch: B:等一下會下大雨，你要記得帶傘。
en: B: It's going to rain heavily, you have to remember to bring an umbrella.

ab: baq mqwalax ku?
en: A: Is it going to rain?

ab: wal mutung mebung coni, pqwalax hayi kisa la.
ch: B:剛剛打雷了，等一下應該就會下雨。
en: B: There was thunder just now, and it's supposed to rain later.

ab: qnwalax la ku?
en: A: Is it raining?

ab: qnwalax coni ha, nyan mhngaw qwalax nya la.
ch: B:剛剛有下雨，現在雨停了。
en: B: It just rained, and now it's stopped.

ab: qnwalax la ku?
en: A: Is it raining?

ab: pisan hayi qnwalax la, nya mhoyiq qa ryaniq qani.
ch: B:好像下過雨了，馬路是濕的。
en: B: It seems to have rained and the road is wet.

ab: minqwalax ku? cwa su nya si qarus?
ch: A:有下雨嗎?你怎麼全身都濕了?
en: A: Is it raining? Why are you all wet?

ab: cyan mqwalax tanux, ini cu aray bruku.
ch: B:外面在下雨，我沒有帶雨傘。
en: B: It's raining outside, so I didn't bring an umbrella.

ab: cyan su blaq ga?
en: A: Are you all right?

ab: tyaba calay behuy nya, mxan calay tunux mu, sbyuhan na behuy qani.
en: B: The wind is blowing so hard that my head hurts.

ab: cyan su blaq ga?
en: A: Are you all right?

ab: tyaba calay wagi nya, txing calay tunux mu sbu’ wagi qani.
ch: B:太陽好大，曬得我頭好暈。
en: B: The sun is so big, it makes me dizzy.
